description: A boutique aesthetics clinic offering non-surgical cosmetic treatments.

services.name: Botox
services.notes: Price varies by treatment area; exact quote at consultation.

services.name: Fillers
services.notes: Price varies by product and volume; exact quote at consultation.

services.name: Consultations
services.notes: Free initial consultation for new clients.

booking.cancellation_policy: 24 hours notice required for cancellations or rescheduling.

escalation_rules: More than two consecutive questions the SOP cannot answer
Explicit request to speak with a human
qualification_questions: What type of business are you enquiring on behalf of (e.g. sole trader, salon, clinic)?
Roughly how many team members handle customer enquiries?
Which tools do you currently use for WhatsApp, email, or phone support?
tone_guidelines: Warm, professional, concise. Use British English. Never provide medical advice.
